headline: How Pricing And CoolIT Are Rewriting The Ecolab (ECL) Investment Narrative
summary: Ecolab’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly from US$319.29 to US$318.95, a very small shift that still matters if you are tracking where analysts see upside or downside. That fine tuning sits against a backdrop of mixed Street views, with some firms lifting price targets on the back of pricing actions and the CoolIT acquisition, while others cut targets by roughly US$15 to US$25 as they reassess what they want to pay. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit together and...
